title: Preserve dashboard artifact links after merge
summary: Replay a task that adds durable artifact refs and post-merge PR-body rewriting so factory artifact links keep working after merge.
expected_evidence: PR metadata tracks a durable artifact ref
merged PR bodies are rewritten against the base branch
artifact links remain valid after head-branch deletion
curator_notes: Selected because it exercises merge-event routing and durable artifact semantics that are important for long-lived factory quality.
